title: Frontend Observability for CWV - jk
description: This Workflow generates Frontend Observability for CWV reports and emails to the specified addresses.
guide:
# Frontend Observability for CWV Report
Get a report of your Core Web Vitals. This Workflow queries Grail and provides data to Dynatrace Intelligence to get recommendations.
These recommendations are then sent to email(s) of your choice.

# Setup
1. Change emails (`to`, `cc`, `bcc`) to be an array of strings.
2. Test with a manual Run, by click the `Run` button.
3. If everything works as expected, change the [Trigger](?trigger=) to a schedule, e.g. Weekly, Daily, etc.

cls.name: cls

input.query:
fetch user.events
| filter characteristics.has_page_summary
| makeTimeseries  
  p75CLS_scalar = percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75, scalar: true)
| limit 50

cls.description: Make use of Dynatrace Grail data in your workflow.

cls_prompt.name: cls_prompt

input.prompt:
Provide a report for the following use case:
## CLS Analysis Report
input.instruction: Provide a Summary, Insights, Observations and Recommendations.
input.supplementary:
Format examples in tables instead of bulleted lists.
Where applicable convert units for readability, e.g. 1000000000 bytes is 1 TiB.
Where applicable show relative percentages, e.g. 100 used and 1000 allocatable is 10% utilized.
Use this analysis:
{{result("cls")["records"]}}

cls_prompt.description: Prompt the Dynatrace Intelligence generative AI

error_count.name: error_count

input.query:
fetch user.events
| filter characteristics.has_error
| makeTimeseries count = count()
| fieldsAdd errors = arraySum(count)
| limit 50

error_count.description: Make use of Dynatrace Grail data in your workflow.

page_load_time.name: page_load_time

input.query:
fetch user.events
| filter characteristics.has_navigation
| makeTimeseries  
  medianPageLoad = percentile(performance.load_event_end, 50),
  medianPageLoad_scalar = percentile(performance.load_event_end, 50, scalar:true)
| limit 50

page_load_time.description: Make use of Dynatrace Grail data in your workflow.

navigations.name: navigations

input.query:
fetch user.events
| filter characteristics.has_navigation 
| makeTimeseries Count = count()
| fieldsAdd navigations = arraySum(Count)
| limit 50

user_actions.name: user_actions

input.query:
fetch user.events
| filter characteristics.has_page_summary or characteristics.has_w3c_navigation_timings
| filter isNotNull(page.name)
| summarize {
    wlcp = if(isNull(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75)), 0, else:percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75)), 
    wcls = if(isNull(percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75)), 0, else:percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75)), 
    winp = if(isNull(percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75)), 0, else:percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75)), 
    Count = countIf(characteristics.has_w3c_navigation_timings)
  }, by: { page.name, dt.rum.application.entity }
| fieldsAdd dt.entity.application = dt.rum.application.entity
| fieldsAdd Application = entityName(dt.entity.application)
| fieldsRemove dt.entity.application
| fields App=Application, Page = page.name, `Count` = Count, CWVScore = if(((wcls >= .1) or (toDouble(wlcp) >= 2500000000) or (toDouble(winp) >= 200000000)), "Γ¥îFail", else: "Γ£àPass"), `LCP` = wlcp, `INP` = winp, `CLS` = round(wcls,decimals:4)
| sort Count desc
| limit 50

user_actions.description: Make use of Dynatrace Grail data in your workflow.

cwv_health.name: cwv_health

input.query:
fetch user.events
| filter characteristics.has_page_summary or characteristics.has_w3c_navigation_timings
| filter isNotNull(page.name)
| summarize {
    wlcp = if(isNull(percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75)), 0, else:percentile(web_vitals.largest_contentful_paint, 75)), 
    wcls = if(isNull(percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75)), 0, else:percentile(web_vitals.cumulative_layout_shift, 75)), 
    winp = if(isNull(percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75)), 0, else:percentile(web_vitals.interaction_to_next_paint, 75)), 
    Count = countIf(characteristics.has_w3c_navigation_timings)
  }, by: { page.name, dt.rum.application.entity }
| fieldsAdd dt.entity.application = dt.rum.application.entity
| fieldsAdd Application = entityName(dt.entity.application)
| fieldsRemove dt.entity.application
| fields App=Application, Page = page.name, CWVScore = if(((wcls >= .1) or (toDouble(wlcp) >= 2500000000) or (toDouble(winp) >= 200000000)), 0, else: 1)
| sort CWVScore asc
| limit 50
